title: Stage codes documented
body: X=eXpense (6th PLEASER stage, disambiguated from E=Execution). STAGE_CODES.md canonical. auto-resolver SKILL.md now has 5-step recipe for adding new playbooks + 8 planned channels for future growth.

title: Fan Li 2026 CLM = Track 2 validated
body: Nat Commun (62x PPARγ, 20x RORγ) uses exactly the method already scoped in our bimodal strategy. Added Tasks 4.4-4.6: LSTM pretrain + 5-step FT on L0, Vina rerank on Cheaha, combined shortlist. See wiki_drafts/bimodal-generation-comparison-2026.md.
